name: Revenge
description: CEO/Elite/Rebirth drama - power struggles, betrayal, and triumphant comebacks

character_blueprints.name: Lena
character_blueprints.description: Sharp-eyed CEO in her late 20s. Tall, confident posture. Designer suit, minimal jewelry. Cold expression with piercing gaze.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: A young CEO woman, late 20s, sharp features, wearing a tailored black suit, confident and commanding presence

character_blueprints.name: Mr. Li
character_blueprints.description: Middle-aged businessman, calculating eyes, expensive watch. Always smiling but eyes betray malice.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Middle-aged businessman in his 50s, wearing an expensive dark suit, calculating smile, luxury watch visible

character_blueprints.name: Alex
character_blueprints.description: Young ambitious executive, charming exterior, competitive nature. Modern business casual.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Young professional man in his late 20s, charming appearance, modern business casual, competitive gaze

scene_library.name: Luxury Penthouse
scene_library.prompt: Modern luxury penthouse interior, floor-to-ceiling windows, city skyline at night, minimalist furniture, cold blue lighting

scene_library.name: Corporate Office
scene_library.prompt: Sleek corporate executive office, glass walls, modern desk, dramatic side lighting, power atmosphere

scene_library.name: Banquet Hall
scene_library.prompt: Elegant banquet hall, crystal chandeliers, round tables with white linens, warm golden lighting

scene_library.name: Underground Parking
scene_library.prompt: Dark underground parking garage, concrete pillars, harsh fluorescent lights, dramatic shadows

color_grade.name: Cold Power
color_grade.description: High contrast cold tones with gold accents

shot_rhythm.style_notes: Quick cuts during confrontations, slow zooms for reveals, Dutch angles for tension

prompt_templates.en: Cinematic shot, {character} in {scene}, {action}, dramatic lighting, cold color grading, high contrast, shallow depth of field, 4K quality
prompt_templates.zh: 电影质感镜头，{character}在{scene}中，{action}，戏剧性光影，冷色调，高对比度，浅景深，4K画质
